final:
module RefModule(
  input clk,
  input reset,
  input [15:0] A,
  input [15:0] B,
  output [15:0] C
);reg [15:0] sum;

    wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
    if (reset) begin
      sum <= 16'b0;
    end else begin
      sum <= A + B;
    end
  end

  assign C = sum;

endmodule
